CRITICAL_1_hardcoded_typography.description: Replaced hardcoded fontSize:12, lineHeight:16, gap:4, marginBottom:4 in dateLine/dateText with semantic.type.label.sm and semantic.space.xs tokens. Removed dateText from StyleSheet.create.

CRITICAL_2_duplicate_formatDate.description: Removed formatDate export from saved-route-card.tsx. Now imports from ./saved-route-card.utils. Updated saved-routes.tsx import and saved-routes.test.ts mock accordingly.

CRITICAL_3_duplicate_SavedRouteCardProps.description: Removed SavedRouteCardProps type definition from saved-route-card.tsx. Now re-exports from ./saved-route-card.types via export type { SavedRouteCardProps }.

CRITICAL_4_tsx_test_dead_code.description: Deleted saved-route-card.test.tsx. File was untracked (never committed) and could not run: jest testMatch only covers .ts files, and @testing-library/react-native is not installed. The acceptance criteria are already covered by saved-route-card.test.ts.
